titleStmt.title: SII 39.120: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 120. (A.R. No. 120 of 1916.) ETTIYĀTTALI, ARANTANGI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. AGASTYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL •••••••••• ŚAKA 1366 (1444 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription registers an order of Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ Toṇḍaimāṉār issued to a temple servant Āṉanda dēvaṉ to measure out a certain fixed quantity of paddy as taxes due to be paid by him on certain lands to the temple of Agattīśuramuḍaiya-nayiṉār. Signatory Nirambaaḻagiyāṉ-Kāliṅgarāyaṉ is mentioned in the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cakāttam 1000 3 100 6 10 6 ṉmeṟ cellā niṉṟa Irattākṣi varuṣam paṅkūṉi ø 2 10 4 §
Aṟantāṅki Aracu Uṭaiyār vaḻakiya maṇavāḷapperumāḷ toṇṭaimāṉār nāṭṭiṉ maṅkalam koyil kaṉmiyāṉa Aṉanta
tevaṉukku kuruntaraiya koṭṭai kiḻaip perumāṇṭi vayalil muṉṉāḷ Ivaṉukku nām viṟṟa nila vaiyittiyaṉ kuṭikkāṭu nāṉ kellai
yu perumāṇṭi kuḷattilum Ūruṇikaḷilu yiṉṉilattukku varum viḻukkāṭu meṭṭu vayalil Ivaṉ koṇṭa maṇavāḷa vayakkalu meṟpaṭi nāṟ
kkāluk karuppukkālu Āka Inta nilattāl varum kaṭamai viṉiyokam veṭṭimuṭṭi vecāri maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭacamuttap piṟāttikaḷukku nayiṉār
tiruvakatticuramuṭaiya nayiṉāṟku māttāl Irutūṇi poṉ kuṭukkumpaṭi nām kaṟpittu kuṭutta Aḷavukku Inta nerile cantirātittavarai
kku Aṉupavittup potakkaṭavāṉākavu Itukku Akutam paṇṇiṉavaṉ gaṅkaikaraiyiṟ kapilaiyaiyu pirāmaṇaraiyu koṉṟa pāpa
ttaip peṟakkaṭavāṉākavu Ippaṭikku Uṭaiyavar Aruḷic ceyaṟpaṭikku nirampa vaḻakiyāṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
